since_last: 33% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.48%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.47% · BTC -1.99% · Gold -1.81% · Nasdaq100 -0.16%. 33% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.48%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.48%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.57%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +11.05%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +11.05%, AVGO +6.08%, ANET +5.94%, AMBA +5.21%, BIDU +4.72%. Laggards: PANW -5.15%, UPST -5.07%, BBAI -4.63%, ZS -4.55%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.62% at $148.55
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.62% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
